description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof profile. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, connected by a paved walkway and surrounded by a spacious patio area. A large swimming pool is integrated into the outdoor space, bordered by the main building and a secondary pavilion. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with extensive use of glass for windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The roof is flat and dark, contrasting with the lighter walls and patio. The overall layout emphasizes openness, functionality, and a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with two main volumes, extensive glass windows, and a large swimming pool set in a spacious patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building, secondary pavilion, and the full length of the swimming pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main building and the pool's proximity to the secondary pavilion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long facade of the main building and the pool area extending toward the secondary structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the entry path, the pool, and the relationship between the two building volumes.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and sliding glass doors in asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, wide glass doors, and a paved approach without decorative columns
